name: linked-styles
description: Linked paragraph style 'HeadingLinked' (bold only) with w:link to 'HeadingLinkedChar' (italic + red + 14pt). Para style and char style have DIVERGENT rPr to prove the linked char style wins.
expected_behavior: Para 1: italic=on, color=FF0000, size=28 from linked character style. bold=off (para style's rPr is NOT used). Para 2: normal formatting.
current_status: IMPLEMENTED — w:link parsed, linked char style rPr used for paragraph runs
